scripts.d1:migrate:local: wrangler d1 execute annuaire-rfe-db --file=./migrations/0001_initial.sql --local && wrangler d1 execute annuaire-rfe-db --file=./migrations/0002_refdata_exclusions_meta.sql --local
scripts.d1:migrate:remote: wrangler d1 execute annuaire-rfe-db --file=./migrations/0001_initial.sql --remote && wrangler d1 execute annuaire-rfe-db --file=./migrations/0002_refdata_exclusions_meta.sql --remote
